_comment: Sample intelligent-router-v0 config for testing per-instance model routing.
Pass to any benchmark's run_infer.py via --llm-config-path.
Classifier = minimax-m2.7. Tier mapping = Frontend -> kimi, Issue Resolution
(other) -> minimax, all other categories -> gpt-5.5. Vision-capable tiers
are kimi-k2.6 and gpt-5.5; image-bearing instances classified into the
minimax tier are auto-rerouted to the vision-capable fallback (gpt-5.5).
Fill in api_key/base_url before use; these are intentionally blank.
